name: Chatham Lodging Trust (REIT) 6.625% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Shares of Beneficial Interest
summary: Chatham Lodging Trust is a self-advised real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in upscale, extended-stay hotels and premium-branded, select-service hotels. The company's properties are located in the United States. Chatham Lodging Trust is based in West Palm Beach, Florida.
